description: Valhalla returns a route that includes an explicit U-turn maneuver. With reject_explicit_u_turn_maneuver=True (new default), this should be rejected by pass-1 and surfaced as emergency_fallback by pass-2.
_note: mock_valhalla=uturn_ok injects maneuver_type=12 (kUturnRight). With reject_explicit_u_turn_maneuver=True, pass-1 hard-rejects this candidate; pass-2 relaxed policy accepts it and surfaces emergency_fallback. The engine never returns no_safe_detour.
